targets.query:
from(bucket: "laser_process")
  |> range(start: -5y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "experiment_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "quality_score")
  |> group(columns: ["quality"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> keep(columns: ["quality", "count"])

panels.title: Speed x Power 히트맵 (OK 구간)
panels.description: X축은 Speed(200/500/1000)를 2020-01-01 기준 +N초 오프셋 시각으로 인코딩한 값입니다. Y축은 Power(W), 색상은 빈도(count)입니다. quality=OK 데이터만 표시합니다.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "laser_process")
  |> range(start: -5y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "experiment_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.quality == "OK")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "speed" or r._field == "power")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "exp_no"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: time(v: int(v: r.speed) * 1000000000 + 1577836800000000000),
      _value: r.power,
      _field: "power",
      _measurement: "experiment_result",
      exp_no: r.exp_no
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])

panels.title: Defocus x Power 히트맵
panels.description: X축은 Defocus(0~4)를 2020-01-01 기준 +N초 오프셋 시각으로 인코딩한 값입니다. Y축은 Power(W), 색상은 빈도(count)입니다.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "laser_process")
  |> range(start: -5y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "experiment_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "defocus" or r._field == "power")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "exp_no"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: time(v: int(v: r.defocus) * 1000000000 + 1577836800000000000),
      _value: r.power,
      _field: "power",
      _measurement: "experiment_result",
      exp_no: r.exp_no
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
